productScope: 감정평가사 1차 및 감정평가사 2차 공식 자료 메타데이터 전용

storagePolicy.description: Q-Net 원문 파일, 기출문제 본문, 정답 본문, OCR 원문, 이미지, ZIP/HWP/PDF 원본은 저장하지 않는다. 사람이 검토한 자료에서 파생한 분류·빈도·검증용 메타데이터만 저장한다.

fieldRules.sourceId: Stable metadata identifier generated from exam metadata plus a short hash; never raw text.
fieldRules.officialSourceId: Must match an official source registry id such as qnet_appraiser_past_questions, qnet_appraiser_final_answers, or qnet_appraiser_public_notice.
fieldRules.sourceKind: One of past_questions, final_answers, public_notice, exam_info, exam_schedule, qualification_detail, statute_or_regulation, operator, or exam_materials.
fieldRules.sourceUrl: Official https URL used for manual source verification only.
fieldRules.localRawFileNameHash: SHA-256 hash of the local file name or local file key; the raw local file name is not stored in committed output.
fieldRules.topicCandidates: Short metadata labels only; no copied question sentence or answer paragraph.
fieldRules.issueCandidates: Short issue labels only; no copied question sentence or answer paragraph.
fieldRules.trapWordCandidates: Short trap-pattern labels only; no source excerpts.
fieldRules.answerSkeletonTags: Structural tags only; no answer body.
fieldRules.calculationTemplateCandidates: Template identifiers or short labels only; no problem values copied from source.
